headline: Monitoring and Observability
description: Monitoring tells you what's wrong; observability lets you ask why. Three pillars: metrics (numeric time-series, counters/gauges), logs (timestamped event records), traces (end-to-end request flow across services). The 'Golden Signals': latency, traffic, errors, saturation.

citation.name: Site Reliability Engineering (Google)
citation.author: Beyer, Betsy, Jones, Chris, Petoff, Jennifer, Murphy, Niall Richard
